title: Nvidia Maps Its Physical AI Strategy Across Engineering, Robotics and Space
description: At GTC, Nvidia announced new physical AI initiatives spanning industrial engineering software, robotics data pipelines and AI computing platforms designed for space systems.

title: Bombay HC Orders E-Commerce, AI Platforms To Remove Deepfake Content Targeting Shilpa Shetty
description: The Bombay High Court ordered e-commerce and AI platforms to remove deepfakes and unauthorised content misusing Shilpa Shetty’s identity. The court termed such content harmful to dignity and privacy, directing swift takedown of flagged material within eight days.

title: Roche scales AI infrastructure with Nvidia GPUs
description: The hardware will help accelerate modelling, data analysis, and clinical trial work.

title: Wall Street ends higher as traders return to AI stocks
description: WALL Street ended sharply higher on Monday, fueled by gains in AI-related stocks, with Meta Platforms climbing after a report that it is preparing for sweeping layoffs, while oil prices retreated amid ongoing uncertainty about the Middle East conflict. Read full story

title: Fascinating 19th Century photos taken at the world's oldest photography studio have been brought back to life - using cutting-edge AI technology
description: WW Winter Ltd in Derby opened in 1867 and has been taking pictures of weddings, christenings and fashion shoots ever since.
